title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rivigo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rivigo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
